heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyAddons for Minecraft Privacy PolicyAddons for Minecraft Privacy PolicyYour privacy is important to us. We design our services with protection of your privacy in mind. This privacy policy explains how Addons for Minecraft treats the data it collects and receives. By using our service, you consent to our privacy policy.

decoder_heading: Personal Data That You Provide Us
ident_heading: Personal Data That You Provide Us
heading_content_part: Personal Data That You Provide UsWe collect personal data from you when you voluntarily provide the information such as when you register for access to, or use the services. For example, when you login to our app using your Google account, your account email, display name, ID string and token information are securely sent to our server for authentication purposes. We use the personal data to provide the services, and to monitor the use of such services.

Non-Identifiable DataWe may collect aggregate statistics about our customers for statistical analysis to improve quality of the product. These statistics are collected passively, and will not include any personally identifying information.

Third Party DisclosureWe do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your personal data. We may share it with the affiliated organizations that need to know the information in order to provide the Addons for Minecraft service, and that have agreed not to disclose it to others. We may also release your information when we believe it is appropriate to comply with the law, enforce our service policies, or protect ours or others' rights, property, or safety.

Updating or Deleting InformationWe will update and delete personal information you have provided to us on request. Please note that any information that we have may remain in backup storage for some period of time after the requests. We may retain certain logs to be consistent with legal requirements.

Changes to this Privacy PolicyWe may update this policy from time to time if our practices change or if changes in the law require us to do so. In the event that we make changes, we will post notice of the new Policy from the privacy link on the App Store page.
Contacting UsPlease also feel free to contact us at contact+privacy@kayenworks.com if you have any questions or feedback about the privacy policy.
Update/Effective DateThis policy was last updated on Oct 19, 2020.
